svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Invocable API Synthesis · Trace for Bird qid 28 · california_schools
13 MCP tool calls · 5 phases · ends with a validated 2-step sequence + 2 registered tools

g.text: "Consider the average difference between K-12 enrollment and 15-17 enrollment of schools that are locally funded,
list the names and DOC type of schools which has a difference above this average."
GOLD SQL · has a SUBQUERY in WHERE → decomposition signal
SELECT T2.School, T2.DOC FROM frpm T1 INNER JOIN schools T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
> (SELECT AVG(T3.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T3.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm T3 ... WHERE T4.FundingType = 'Locally funded')
TOOL-CALL TRACE · color = MCP tool family
PHASE 1 · ORIENT · read schema, oracle, value vocabularies — no hallucinated columns
Subquery in WHERE → 2-tool decomposition. Tool A computes the AVG; Tool B filters by FundingType + threshold. Slot examples for funding_type exclude "Locally funded" (the answer literal).
PHASE 2 · REGISTER TOOL 1 · the inner aggregate (the "AVG" in the subquery)
→ {registered: true} · row inserted into state/california_schools.db / table tools
PHASE 3 · SMOKE-TEST TOOL 1 · required by the prompt — fail fast on column typos / wrong placeholders
→ runs the registered code on a mode=ro SQLite connection → {output: {"avg_difference": 16.7…}} · smoke-test passes
PHASE 4 · REGISTER + TEST TOOL 2 · the outer filter (uses the avg as a threshold)
PHASE 5 · RECORD + VALIDATE · freeze the sequence; verify final = gold under set-equality
→ recorded: true · persisted to sequences table
runs gold SQL → 57 rows · runs sequence with {{avg.avg_difference}} resolved → 57 rows
